evals.prompt: I have 200 accounts in my territory. Apollo shows intent data on 40 of them. How do I prioritize?
evals.expected_output: Scoring matrix combining ICP fit and intent signal strength, with tiered prioritization and action recommendations

assertions.name: scoring_matrix
assertions.description: Builds a prioritization framework combining ICP fit + signal strength

assertions.name: tiered_output
assertions.description: Segments the 40 accounts into priority tiers with different actions per tier

assertions.name: icp_gate
assertions.description: Emphasizes that intent alone doesn't override poor ICP fit

evals.prompt: Three of my former champions just changed jobs. How do I reach out?
evals.expected_output: Job change outreach strategy with timing guidance, warm messaging templates, and relationship-first approach

assertions.name: warm_approach
assertions.description: Leads with congratulations and relationship, not a pitch

assertions.name: sequence_design
assertions.description: Designs a multi-touch approach (congrats → value → soft ask)

evals.prompt: How do I set up intent tracking in Apollo?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step Apollo intent configuration with topic selection guidance

assertions.name: setup_steps
assertions.description: Walks through Settings > Intent topic configuration

assertions.name: topic_selection
assertions.description: Advises on selecting relevant keywords and competitor names

assertions.name: plan_requirement
assertions.description: Notes that intent data requires Professional or Organization plan
